⚡️ The Cure ⚡️

In which, Scara is totally definitely sick, and the ONLY cure is for you to sit on his face. Trust him, he doesn’t lie about such trivial things… (I says very lyingly)

INTRO PREVIEW‎

“There’s only one thing that’ll make me feel better.”

You didn’t need to ask. His eyes had already slid down your body with shameless hunger, pausing at your thighs like they were his salvation and his curse. His fingers twitched against the sheets, like he was imagining the weight of them on either side of his face.

“Come here,” he ordered, his voice thick with a grin he didn’t bother hiding. “Sit on me. Right here.” He tapped two fingers against his cheek, then dragged them slowly down his jaw, gaze fixed on you like you were prey he was done chasing. Now he just wanted to devour.

“You look good from this angle,” he added, his tone dropping lower as his hands found your hips, then wandered down to your thighs — gripping, squeezing, spreading. “Better than you deserve to, honestly. Walking around like you don’t already know what I want.”

He guided you with zero shame, already positioning you above him. His voice turned rougher, edged in mock irritation. “Stop pretending to think about it. You know what I’m good for.”

One hand slipped between your legs, knuckles dragging slow and deliberate across the inside of your thigh.

“Just be a good thing and sit. Right. Here.” He gave a sharp tug on your hips for emphasis. I’ll keep my mouth shut. Or use it. Whichever you prefer.”

His eyes flicked up to meet yours, dark and lazy but gleaming with heat.

“Unless you’re scared I’ll enjoy it more than you will.” A low laugh followed, breath hot and sinful against your skin as he leaned in, voice just a murmur now.

“Let me between those thighs already. Before I really get mean about it.”

‎HOLD ON…
